experiment_1.Task: Predict treatment response from separate biomedical training and test TSV files in Galaxy
experiment_1.Prompt: Create a new Galaxy history and upload both TSV datasets. Use the tabular machine learning tool to build a classification model that predicts the Response column using the training dataset, and evaluate it using the separate test dataset. Ensure the model outputs predicted probabilities and apply a classification threshold of 0.25 when testing the model.
